kba_problem_summary: Momentary energization (up to 3 seconds) of one or more discrete outputs on affected 32-channel DO cards during specific power-up conditions
severity_justification: Unexpected activation of field outputs during power-up can cause process anomalies or safety issues if devices latch without proper feedback, classified by Emerson as Product Safety Concern
occurrence_justification: Requires very specific conditions (power cycle with card already installed in carrier); observed only in FAT/lab, no known field occurrences in operating plants
detectability_justification: Transient occurs during card power-up before full controller configuration loads; no dedicated diagnostic or alarm mentioned, visibility depends on monitoring during the event

modifiers_applied.reason: Problem affects I/O hardware cards at Level 1
Free hardware replacement program offered by Emerson
Only risk assessment + replacement; no simple operational workaround

affected_products: SE4052S1T2B6 DO 32 Ch, 24 Vdc, High Side
workaround_description: Nessun workaround tecnico; ogni cliente deve valutare il rischio in base alla propria strategia di controllo e dispositivi di campo
fix_reference: Replacement gratuito delle schede con serial number rientranti nei range indicati (programma esteso fino al 31 Mar 2020)
confidence_note: La severità effettiva è dichiarata da Emerson come dipendente dalla specifica implementazione del cliente (strategie di controllo e read-back), informazione non presente nella KBA
notes: Il problema è limitato a batch produttivi specifici (serial number ranges dal 2012 in poi). Non si manifesta durante hot-swap o installazione normale. Emerson fornisce lista seriali più precisa ai rappresentanti locali.
